## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes (ruff + mypy)
- [ ] `make pytest` passes (unit tests)
- [ ] `make test-sql` passes (SQL suite via haybarn) — or `make test-stdio` locally
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `CLAUDE.md`) if behavior or the function catalog changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under "Unreleased"
